samples:
I hope you're feeling all right
No pain no shame, I didn't know
If this is where we wind up
It's better than the last time


Let's just float through the ocean
And leave it all behind
With our hearts alive in my eyes
We'll make sure they know that I tried
I tried so hard to tell you
Just how much it meant to me
That was all there was to us
You were never around


All that glitters isn't gold
The stones we wear aren't always found
You've got to dig deep down inside yourself
Dig through these mountains of grief and doubt

Life is short, but we can swallow
These bitter pills with a little sugar
As passion encircles daily storm
So will the cycles of your days and nights


Always here for you love
There are plenty more fish in the sea
Will this bring us back together?
How about you try me

It's the first time I saw your face
I was standing in the pouring rain
You were walking, you had some grace
And you didn't seem to mind


Your hair hung all around your face
You stood there dripping, watching me
Watching me stand here like a stranger
As though I knew not what to say


Then it came down upon us
Like a waterfall
Yeah, it came down upon us
Like a waterfall

Now it's hard for me to breathe
With these thoughts of love and giving
How can we just keep on living?
When I need this love so badly


But then again, when everything's said and done
This river runs through my head
Carve out your teeth with a razor blade
Rending all that binds us
Tear it down with a vengeance


Then it came down upon us
Like a waterfall
Yeah, it came down upon us
Like a waterfall




Let's rearrange
The pieces we have found
To make a perfect picture
Of our lives

Wage no war thou brutal sea
I laugh at you, oh oh, you can't have me


Save yourself, cause I can't get you off my back
Don't think so, not today and never after that


Throw your hands up high and scream in agony
Look for signs of life but don't depend on me


You just killed the life inside me
And now I can't breathe
If we stick around you will see
That this is our destiny


The fight rages on inside
It brings out a savage beauty


Roll over and play your slide
Watch it go by from here to the left, straight ahead and right
Incisors aged in gristle
Thought to be the teeth of animals
Fierce protectors of their lairs
Be ready, they are coming closer
One-eyed, presence known as Rhinocerops


We all grew up singing songs
Of wizards, elves and dwarves
Through the ages they were worshipped
Now they watch while we sleep


Into the caverns of the North
Herd across the field with reckless abandon


Ride through fire and smoke
Lay waste to enemies

The storm comes down, it soothes the brow
It's a good thing if you want to play


I wish that I could say
I was happy all the time
But there are times when I feel misunderstood
And that really sinks a knife in my heart




There's magic in water
That heals the soul and brings us all together
You see the faces of those who have no fear
Look at them standing on the shore






When they come down, don't dry your eyes
Don't turn away or they'll pass you by


I wish that I could say
I was happy all the time
But there are times when I feel misunderstood
And that really sinks a knife in my heart




There's magic in water
That heals the soul and brings us all together
You see the faces of those who have no fear
Look at them standing on the shore

There's magic in water
That heals the soul and brings us all together
You see the faces of those who have no fear
Look at them standing on the shore

Wage no war thou brutal sea
Take me in, you can't have this one
I laugh at you, and I will drown


Bulls roar loud
The lion roars
Roar louder


A deep breath before the plunge
Holding hearts in my eyes for time
A quick glance to the sky above
There are no stars tonight

Bulls roar loud
The lion roars
Roar louder
Incisors aged white
Animal spirits come calling
Throw away the weight of today
With visions of a brighter light




Bulls roar loud
The lion roars
Roar louder
Bulls roar loud
The lion roars
Roar louder


Death trap
Snake charmer
Vampire
Necromancing
Dead branch
Bone grave
Black robe
Cloaked form
Skulls gather
Bone engraved
Stone engraved
Shatter long love vows
Broken wings with lacerations open sores
Sever ties that bind us
Releasing all control

Left behind
To dry
As passion cools
And grief departs


The weary traveler enters a calm, dreamlike valley
Awaiting instructions from the ancient ones of the Tuon
There is no sound
All thoughts are loud
Here we lay


Within this silence
Find our way
Before it's too late
Letting loose control


Fight or escape?
What will you say?
Will there be light?
Do I stay?


I wish that I was still there
We were just getting started
I want to keep on breathing
So many lessons to learn


Over mountains
Through valleys
Carve out your teeth
Dig deep and exhale


Life's changed
But not for the worse
It comes with blessings
Enduring loss




This has come to reason
Only you can save yourself
Take your life in your own two hands
Shatter long and live


Spirits at play
Bones hollow and empty
Stand up straight
Refuse to follow

When you don't know what to say
Just stand around and watch it rain
Feel it all over your face
It's going to clear everything out again


There are still a few things I need to say before this lets loose the flood


Look ahead to where we stand
Standing in this ocean of black
Looking up, wondering if God is watching me
I wonder if he sees my worth at all


All that I am feeling today
Is not easy to breathe


We have tried to tell you that many times before
And I feel so bad for you
You had no idea how much time had gone away from you


The sound they make as they fall
The crackling of the driftwood burns your eyes out
You can almost hear them all decompose
A blessing or a curse? It's hard to tell


Still there are some things I need to say before this lets loose the flood


And I wonder how many lives I've taken
And I wonder how many hearts I've broken
But I know it's too late now
The damage has been done


We are coming home

Give and take
We live and breathe
Apathy we breed


It's just a matter of time
Before I run out of lies
And then what will I say?
I don't know, but it won't be a lie


All alone in this world
With no one around
To stand up and fight for us


There is a sickness inside my head
That makes me want to scream and shake
But I cannot break these chains
Holding me from being free




(Bridge)

Now we have all that we need
Just turn around and take a deep breath
Then stand up straight
Look at where you are now
And count your blessings


No escape
You have tried everything
Willpower's not enough


What does the sun give to us
The earth to our calling
Death to the land and sea



Now I am on my way back home
Leaving everything I own behind
Saying sorry to the ones I have known
Forgive those who have wronged me

Now you see all this time
I've been away from home
And it pains me to know that I'm not there anymore


It's a good love, but I want more
All I need is your loving and devotion
Just close your eyes and pretend everything's fine


When the sun goes down tonight
We will stand up screaming loud
As it soothes the soul of the red planet


Let loose the hounds, let go
Spirits alive in the ether
Sulk in anger, settle down
Ride the tides we make our own


If only I could wipe away the slate
Refill my cup, refilling my bones
To mend what I have broken
So many times before


When the sun goes down tonight
We will stand up screaming loud
As it soothes the soul of the red planet


Let loose the hounds, let go
Spirits alive in the ether
Sulk in anger, settle down
Ride the tides we make our own

We are told there's magic in water
A place to cleanse and purify
All is known that gives us birth
Our roots, our past will come to light


Guidance through the portal
Reflecting on your life
Your fate was written in the stars
Now you wear it with pride


As we gather what we have sown
It grows within a calm and endless silence
The seeds of doubt began to grow
Choking out the sunlight

Letting go of yesterday
And all the weight that held me grounded
I had run out of options
There was none left but to let loose




And as I slip into oblivion
You can hear the sound of splashing water
Covered from head to toe
In a maelstrom of doubt and wonder


Spirits alive
Visions of what once was
Head for higher ground
To see my fate
Boiling rage
Ripping through my insides
Releasing pressure
Taking every last drop



I came close to madness
I was running out of time
This is where I lay, stripped bare
With nothing at all to find

Still my heart is beating
Right here in my chest
Will it ever stop?
Or does it not matter?
